name: Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded zucchini in a strainer and press or squeeze with your hands to remove excess liquid.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, and oil together until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, vanilla, and chopped nuts to the egg mixture. Mix by hand until just combined.
4. Add the shredded zucchini (without the excess liquid) to the batter and mix until everything is evenly incorporated.
5. Grease two loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees F. The recipe can be doubled if desired.
